summary_from_search: S&P 500 slipped 0.02% to 7,138; Nasdaq up 0.04% to 24,673; Dow fell 280 pts (-0.57%) to 48,861. Fed held rates at 3.5%-3.75%. Oil rallied on US blockade of Iranian ports. Alphabet +7% on earnings beat. Meta -6% on high capex. S&P up ~9.3% for April, Nasdaq +14.3% — best month since 2020.
